headline: 5 Consumer Discretionary Stocks to Buy Despite the Sector's Bloodbath
summary: RL, HAS, FOXA, HTHT and WMG are five consumer discretionary stocks that stand out despite the sector facing pressure from rate uncertainty and geopolitical risks.
